CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant Bar Association Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MARTIN GLICKFELD, SEIFER, MURKEN, DESPINA, JAMES & TEICHMAN, 415.441.7491, FOR PLAINTIFF SEIFER, MURKEN, DESPINA, JAMES & TEICHMAN.
JASON FELLNER, ESQ., MURPHY PEARSON BRADLEY & FEENEY, 415.788.1900, FOR DEFNEDANT BAR ASSOCIATION OF CALIFORNIA.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant Bar Association Of San Francisco's Demurrer To Complaint is overruled. The claims are adequately pled. From the face of the Complaint, it is not clear there was arbitration conducted pursuant to Bus. and Prof. Code 6200-6206 therefore it is not clear Defendant has immunity under Bus. and Prof. Code 6200(f). The Court will not consider the common law arbitral immunity argument raised only in Defendant's reply papers as Plaintiff did not have an opportunity to address that argument. The Court declines to take judicial notice of the requested documents. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to September 12, 2012 because the court does not have courtesy copies of the moving papers. The moving party is required to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 302 no later than 4pm September 4 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
